scope: A SwornAgent TUI operator can discover and asynchronously open the same immutable ref-only release catalog snapshot and high-water slice evidence as the board command, with explicit textual markers for uncommitted evidence and a read-only filesystem fallback when no usable Git HEAD exists.

test_results.output_ref: live completion run 2026-07-18 — all three packages passed
live completion run 2026-07-18 — repository-wide suite passed
live completion run 2026-07-18 — 4/4 acceptance checks covered
live completion run 2026-07-18 — PASS with four non-blocking informational findings
live reachability run 2026-07-18 — all nine named integration tests passed

reachability.evidence: The named verbose command in test_results drove the root Bubble Tea Model entry point in a real temporary Git repository whose HEAD had no release, selected refs/heads/release-wt/ref-only-release, executed the Enter-returned asynchronous command, and observed T1-core plus the exact verified/committed state from refs/heads/track/ref-only-release/T1-core. It also proved no-HEAD fallback, exact [uncommitted] markers, visible catalog failure, navigation/loading, and stale sourceRef rejection; all nine tests passed.

delivered.item: AC-01 — the releases pane and selected board consume one immutable all-ref CatalogRecord, preserving the canonical topology sourceRef and the exact high-water SliceState evidence selected by the board authority.
AC-02 — board rows and the selected release aggregate render the exact textual [uncommitted] marker only from StateDurability, without reading or re-ranking status evidence.

AC-03 — DiscoverCatalog provides a bytewise, read-only board-package filesystem fallback for non-Git or unborn roots, prefers board.json without lazy migration, projects matching status as working-tree/uncommitted, and surfaces catalog identity failures unchanged through Model.View without partial releases.
AC-04 — bytewise list ordering, bounded j/k/up/down navigation, asynchronous Loading… state, and release-plus-sourceRef stale-result rejection remain reachable through Model.Update.
delivered.evidence: internal/tui/tui_test.go:TestRefAwareReleaseInteractionContract and TestRefOnlyBoardLoadRejectsStaleDifferentSourceRef; required test commands all exit 0
